arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Bologna in the Champions League on Wednesday night as the Reds look to continue a strong start under Arne Slot. The Merseysiders are aiming for a fifth consecutive win in all competitions and to build on an impressive 3-1 win at AC Milan in their Champions League opener.
